comment.body:
Think macro for a second… 
global peace and prosperity come from cooperation and shared ideals, yet today’s West treats every interaction—trade, diplomacy—as a zero-sum game. Countries build financial, military, cultural, even physical walls, viewing interdependence and multilateral institutions as threats, not assets. 
This mindset accelerates arms races and raises the risk of outright war.

Just keeping things honest.
